description: You are a Special Education Teacher at Lakewood Heights Elementary. Create a comprehensive Individualized Education Program (IEP) document for student Mateo Reyes-Contreras based on assessment data provided in /home/ga/Documents/student_iep_data.json. Using Apache OpenOffice Writer, save the document as /home/ga/Documents/IEP_Reyes-Contreras_Mateo_2024.odt. The document must include sections for Student Information, Present Levels (PLAAFP), Measurable Annual Goals, Special Education Services, Accommodations, Least Restrictive Environment, Assessment Participation, and IEP Team Signatures, in that order. Format the document using 'Heading 1' paragraph style for main section titles and 'Heading 2' for subsections. Include an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning and page numbers in the footer. Use tables to organize the Annual Goals, Services List, and Accommodations. Login: username 'ga', no password.
